subject: Pass Without Trace cast
fact: Akritas cast Pass Without Trace to boost the party's stealth while retreating from the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: Cast by Akritas to provide a significant boost to the entire party's stealth, masking their movements and sounds as they retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard.

subject: Daein mimics Graz'zt
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the voice of the demon lord Graz'zt, deceiving the Cambion guards into abandoning their posts.
source_quote: first by Daein to mimic the terrifying voice of the demon lord Graz'zt to deceive the Cambion guards into abandoning their posts

subject: Daein mimics Veris
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion to mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris during the dinner, tricking Vraxen into believing a conspiracy was afoot.
source_quote: later to mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris during the dinner, tricking Vraxen into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd

subject: Telekinetic Movement of runic key
fact: Daein used Telekinetic Movement to silently pull the runic key across the obsidian dining table into the party's possession.
source_quote: Used by Daein to silently pull the runic key across the obsidian dining table and into the party's possession while the hosts were distracted by the Owlbear's rampage

subject: Owlbear rampage
fact: An Owlbear rampaged during the dinner, distracting the hosts.
source_quote: while the hosts were distracted by the Owlbear's rampage

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The party retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard.
source_quote: as they retreated from the Six-Fingered Courtyard

subject: obsidian dining table
fact: The runic key was pulled across the obsidian dining table.

subject: runic key
fact: Daein pulled the runic key into the party's possession.
source_quote: pull the runic key across the obsidian dining table and into the party's possession

subject: Daein
fact: Daein used Minor Illusion twice during the session.
source_quote: Used twice during the session: first by Daein

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Daein mimicked the voice of the demon lord Graz'zt.
source_quote: mimic the terrifying voice of the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: High Inquisitor Veris
fact: Daein mimicked the voice of High Inquisitor Veris.
source_quote: mimic the voice of High Inquisitor Veris

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen was tricked into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd.
source_quote: tricking Vraxen into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd

subject: General Veperyd
fact: Vraxen was tricked into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd.
source_quote: tricking Vraxen into believing a conspiracy was afoot between Veris and General Veperyd

subject: Cambion guards
fact: The Cambion guards abandoned their posts after being deceived.
source_quote: deceive the Cambion guards into abandoning their posts

subject: Owlbear
fact: An Owlbear rampaged during the dinner.
